title: staging_population_slot_v0 — loose capture of one /api/population/{slot} payload
description: Staging payload: the raw JSON returned by /api/population/{slot}, captured verbatim under payload.body with the slot name echoed for indexability. Schema is intentionally permissive (additionalProperties: true) — promote to a normalized schema per slot type once the rendering contract stabilises (one normalized schema per slot, named e.g. pcangsd_pca_v1, family_clusters_v1, …).

body.description: Raw JSON document from the slot endpoint.
